leadText: The Wide Lens (Japanese: こうかくレンズ Wide-Angle Lens) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV that slightly boosts the holder's accuracy.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the holder's accuracy by 10% (approximated as 4505/4096 from Generation V onward).

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of moves. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of moves. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of the holder's moves.
